question.label: Team expectations
question.name: When you second-guess, what team expectation feels hardest to read?
question.description: Drills into the specific expectation gap behind his second-guessing.

answer: Local setup is better now, but I still lose time when the design and API details do not match.

assessment.note: He names a specific expectation mismatch between design and API details that is still costing him time, signaling a mild clarity gap.

new_queue.label: Design API mismatch
new_queue.name: When design and API details clash, what usually ends up unclear to you?

new_queue.label: Shipping hesitation
new_queue.name: What usually makes you pause before shipping?

new_queue.label: Tool friction
new_queue.name: Which part of the toolchain slows you down most right now?

new_queue.label: Independence support
new_queue.name: What support from me would help you ship with less second-guessing?

new_queue.label: Next focus
new_queue.name: Given what we covered, where do you want to focus first?

history.answer_excerpt: I can do the tasks, but I still second-guess whether my approach matches team expectations.
